pre_training_command: mkdir -p "$PGOLF_RUN_ROOT" "$(dirname "$PGOLF_SUBMISSION_DIR")" && git fetch origin "${PGOLF_BRANCH:-main}" && git checkout "${PGOLF_BRANCH:-main}" && git pull --ff-only origin "${PGOLF_BRANCH:-main}" && bash "$PGOLF_REPO_DIR/scripts/parameter-golf-materialize-public-cache.sh" --contract "$PGOLF_REPO_DIR/fixtures/parameter_golf/google/parameter_golf_google_input_contract_v1.json" --target-root "${PGOLF_INPUT_TARGET_ROOT:-/workspace/parameter-golf}" > "$PGOLF_INPUT_MATERIALIZATION_REPORT_PATH" && cargo run -q -p psionic-train --example parameter_golf_non_record_submission_bundle -- "$PGOLF_SUBMISSION_DIR"
execution_entrypoint_command: cd "$PGOLF_SUBMISSION_DIR" && eval "$($PGOLF_REPO_DIR/scripts/parameter-golf-read-input-materialization-env.sh --report "$PGOLF_INPUT_MATERIALIZATION_REPORT_PATH")" && PSIONIC_PARAMETER_GOLF_EXECUTION_MODE=distributed_8xh100_train WORLD_SIZE=8 NCCL_DEBUG=WARN python3 train_gpt.py
